hooks.command: cd "/home/user/wtf-app" && git add -A && if ! git diff --staged --quiet; then git commit -m "chore: auto-deploy admin-tool changes" && git push origin HEAD:master && node scripts/notion-deploy-log.js && echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ Changements committé et pushé sur master → déploiement Vercel déclenché"}' ; fi
